title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 57.030 - Reelected, new bond
text:
57.030.  Reelected, new bond. — Should any sheriff be reelected, he shall give a new bond and security within fifteen days from the date that he or she is sworn into office; and should he or she fail to do so, his or her former sureties shall not be held liable for any business done by him after the fifteen days expire.
(RSMo 1939 § 13126, A.L. 2001 H.B. 80) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11506; 1919 § 11630; 1909 § 11201
